nasb.text: You shall put the other two ends of the two cords on the two filigree settings, and put them on the shoulder pieces of the ephod, at the front of it.

esv.text: The two ends of the two cords you shall attach to the two settings of filigree, and so attach it in front to the shoulder pieces of the ephod.

cnv.text: 你又要把那兩條鍊子的另兩端接在兩槽上，連在以弗得前面的肩帶上。

ccb.text: 再把金链的另一端接在以弗得肩带的两个金框上。
